basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026 for post of Project Assistant. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 07-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Hyderabad official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Hyderabad Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: IIT Hyderabad Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
